topics.name: 🌍 Environment
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Môi trường

cards.example: Deforestation is destroying large areas of tropical rain forest.
It is crucial to preserve biodiversity for the health of our planet.
The destruction of the rainforests is contributing to global warming.
Investing in renewable energy helps combat climate change.
Flying less is one way to reduce your carbon footprint.
Pollution threatens the entire aquatic ecosystem.
Wildlife conservation is a global priority.
Factories must limit the release of harmful pollutants.
We need sustainable solutions to protect the environment.
Using reusable bags is an eco-friendly practice.

topics.name: 🎓 Education
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Giáo dục

cards.example: The school's curriculum is designed to be comprehensive and flexible.
Participating in extracurricular activities helps students develop soft skills.
The school places a strong emphasis on academic achievement.
Distance learning has become increasingly popular in recent years.
Rising tuition fees put financial pressure on many families.
She won a scholarship to study abroad.
Adult literacy programs are essential in developing countries.
Vocational training prepares students for specific trades.
High dropout rates are a concern in many urban schools.
Critical thinking is a valuable skill for the 21st century.

topics.name: 💻 Technology
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Công nghệ

cards.example: Artificial intelligence is transforming many industries.
Virtual reality is used for training simulations.
Automation has replaced many manual jobs.
Social media algorithms personalize your feed.
Strong cybersecurity measures protect against hacking.
Cloud computing allows remote access to files.
The app has a simple, user-friendly interface.
The company is known for its cutting-edge research.
Old technology quickly becomes obsolete.
Technological innovation has changed our daily lives.

topics.name: 🩺 Health
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Sức khỏe

cards.example: A sedentary lifestyle is a major risk factor for many chronic diseases.
A balanced diet rich in fruits and vegetables is essential for good health.
Regular exercise contributes to overall physical and mental well-being.
Diabetes is a common chronic disease worldwide.
Obesity rates have been rising in many developed countries.
A strong immune system helps fight off infections.
Life expectancy has increased significantly over the past century.
Vaccines have eradicated many deadly diseases.
The medication may cause side effects such as nausea.

cards.back: hệ thống chăm sóc sức khỏe
cards.example: A robust healthcare system is vital for any nation.

topics.name: 💼 Work & Career
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Công việc & Nghề nghiệp

cards.back: sự hài lòng với công việc
cards.example: Job satisfaction is often more important than a high salary.

cards.back: cân bằng công việc - cuộc sống
cards.example: Achieving a good work-life balance reduces stress.
She quickly climbed the career ladder at her firm.
Flexible hours allow employees to manage personal commitments.
People often prefer government jobs because of job security.
The unemployment rate dropped after the new policies.
Relevant qualifications increase your chances of getting hired.
An internship provides valuable work experience.
He worked hard and received a promotion within a year.
Her daily commute takes over an hour.

topics.name: ✈️ Travel & Tourism
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Du lịch

cards.example: Paris is a popular tourist destination.
Ecotourism aims to minimize environmental impact.
Preserving cultural heritage is important for future generations.
Backpackers often stay in hostels to save money.
We planned a detailed itinerary for our trip.
The hotel offers comfortable accommodation.
You need a visa to enter many countries.
I bought a souvenir from the local market.
Traveling during off-season can save you money.
The drive along the coast is incredibly scenic.

topics.name: 📱 Media & Communication
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Truyền thông

cards.example: Mass media influences public opinion.
Social media has changed the way we communicate.
Censorship is a controversial issue in many countries.
Fake news can spread rapidly online.
A journalist must report the truth.
Some news outlets show political bias.
Clickbait headlines are designed to get attention.
Many brands collaborate with social media influencers.
The video went viral within hours.
Always verify information before sharing it.

topics.name: 🏛️ Government & Politics
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Chính phủ & Chính trị

cards.example: Democracy allows citizens to vote.
The government introduced a new economic policy.
New legislation aims to reduce plastic waste.
Taxation funds public services.
Bureaucracy often slows down decision-making.
Corruption undermines public trust.
The general election will take place next month.
The opposition party criticized the new law.
International sanctions were imposed.
Welfare programs support the poor.

topics.name: 👮 Society & Crime
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Xã hội & Tội phạm

cards.example: Juvenile delinquency is often linked to family issues.
Cybercrime is a growing threat.
Rehabilitation helps offenders reintegrate.
High recidivism rates indicate prison system failure.
Harsh punishments act as a deterrent.
Incarceration rates are rising.
Community service is an alternative to prison.
Discrimination based on race is illegal.
The perpetrator was arrested quickly.
A witness testified in court.

topics.name: 🎨 Art & Culture
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Nghệ thuật & Văn hóa

cards.example: Contemporary art can be challenging to understand.
Our heritage includes traditions and monuments.
The Mona Lisa is a masterpiece.
He creates sculptures from metal.
Performance art often involves live action.
Aesthetics is the study of beauty.
We must respect indigenous cultures.
Cultural assimilation can erase traditions.
Cultural diversity enriches society.
Efforts to preserve ancient buildings are essential.

topics.name: 🔬 Science
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Khoa học

cards.example: The experiment tested a hypothesis.
Empirical evidence supports the theory.
Peer review ensures research quality.
They work in a modern laboratory.
Lightning is a natural phenomenon.
A breakthrough in cancer treatment was announced.
The variable affected the outcome.
There is a correlation between diet and health.
Stem cell research holds promise.
Computers can simulate weather patterns.

topics.name: 🌌 Space
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Vũ trụ

cards.example: Astronomy studies celestial objects.
The Milky Way is our galaxy.
A black hole has strong gravity.

cards.back: hành tinh ngoài hệ mặt trời
cards.example: Scientists discovered a new exoplanet.
An asteroid passed near Earth.
Satellites orbit the Earth.
The Hubble telescope captures stunning images.
A space probe was sent to Mars.
Stars are millions of light-years away.
The lunar module landed safely.

topics.name: 🍽️ Food & Nutrition
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Thực phẩm & Dinh dưỡng

cards.example: Organic food is grown without pesticides.
GM crops can increase yields.
Some additives are harmful.
Nut allergies can be serious.
She follows a vegan diet.
Counting calories helps weight management.
Italian cuisine is popular worldwide.
Rice is a staple food in Asia.
Food security is a global challenge.
She has culinary skills.

topics.name: 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family & Relationships
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Gia đình & Quan hệ

cards.example: A nuclear family consists of parents and children.
In many cultures, extended family lives together.
A good upbringing shapes character.
I have two siblings.
She is a full-time caregiver for her mother.
The generation gap can cause misunderstandings.
Divorce rates have increased.
There is a strong bond between twins.
Parents nurture their children.
He is the breadwinner of the family.

topics.name: 🛍️ Shopping & Consumerism
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Mua sắm & Tiêu dùng

cards.example: Impulse buying leads to overspending.

cards.back: lòng trung thành với thương hiệu
cards.example: Brand loyalty keeps customers returning.
The product comes with a two-year warranty.
This jacket was a real bargain.
They offer a 20% discount.
Materialistic values can reduce happiness.
Ethical consumerism supports fair trade.
Buying second-hand saves money.
Counterfeit goods are illegal.
The store offers a money-back guarantee.

topics.name: ⚽ Sports
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Thể thao

cards.example: Marathon running requires endurance.
Good stamina helps in long matches.
Team spirit is crucial for success.
Doping is banned in sports.
He is an amateur boxer.
She turned professional at age 18.
The referee made a controversial call.
A daily workout improves fitness.
He suffered a serious injury.
Recreational sports are fun and healthy.

topics.name: 🐘 Animals
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Động vật

cards.example: Pandas are an endangered species.
Dinosaurs are extinct.
The forest is their natural habitat.
Poaching threatens rhinos.
Wildlife conservation is important.
Dogs are domestic animals.
Lions are apex predators.
Zebras are prey for lions.
Bird migration occurs twice a year.
Animal cruelty is illegal.

topics.name: 🌦️ Weather & Climate
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Thời tiết & Khí hậu

cards.example: Climate change is causing extreme weather.
The drought affected crops.
Floods destroyed many homes.
The hurricane caused massive damage.
High humidity makes it feel hotter.
The forecast predicts rain tomorrow.
A heatwave gripped the region.
The thunderstorm knocked out power.
Temperate climates have mild winters.
Deserts are arid regions.

topics.name: 📈 Business
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Kinh doanh

cards.example: Entrepreneurship drives innovation.
The startup raised millions in funding.
The merger created a giant corporation.
Company revenue increased by 15%.
They have a high profit margin.
The firm filed for bankruptcy.
Global supply chains were disrupted.
They gained market share quickly.
The company has a virtual monopoly.
He bought a fast-food franchise.

topics.name: 🧠 Psychology
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Tâm lý học

cards.example: Cognitive skills include memory and reasoning.
Perception can be influenced by expectations.
Motivation drives behavior.
Emotions affect decision-making.
Personality is shaped by genetics and environment.
Depression is a serious illness.
Anxiety can be treated with therapy.
Empathy helps understand others' feelings.
Resilience helps overcome adversity.
Low self-esteem can lead to problems.

topics.name: 📜 History
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Lịch sử

cards.example: Ancient civilizations like Egypt were advanced.
Archaeology uncovers past societies.
The museum displays artifacts.
The Ming dynasty ruled China.
The industrial revolution changed the world.
The Roman empire was vast.
Many countries were once colonies.
The treaty ended the war.
Feudal systems had lords and serfs.
A statue commemorates the event.

topics.name: 🗣️ Language
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Ngôn ngữ

cards.example: Linguistics studies language structure.
Syntax governs sentence structure.
Semantics deals with meaning.
He speaks a local dialect.
She has a French accent.
Being bilingual is an asset.
His mother tongue is Vietnamese.
Fluency comes with practice.
English is a global lingua franca.
Children acquire language naturally.

topics.name: 🚗 Transport
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Giao thông vận tải

cards.example: Traffic congestion is a daily problem.
Road infrastructure needs upgrading.
Mass transit reduces car use.
Commuters face long delays.
Bus fares increased.
Hybrid vehicles save fuel.
Autonomous vehicles are being tested.
Avoid driving during rush hour.
Vehicle emissions pollute the air.
The city is bicycle-friendly.

topics.name: ⚡ Energy
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Năng lượng

cards.example: Renewable sources like solar are clean.
Coal is a non-renewable resource.
Solar power is becoming cheaper.
Wind farms generate electricity.
Hydroelectric dams provide power.
Geothermal energy uses Earth's heat.
Nuclear energy is controversial.
Burning fossil fuels causes pollution.
Energy conservation reduces bills.
The company aims to be carbon neutral.

topics.name: 🏙️ Urban & Rural
topics.description: Từ vựng IELTS chủ đề Đô thị & Nông thôn

cards.example: Urbanization is rapid in developing countries.

cards.back: làn sóng di cư khỏi nông thôn
cards.example: The rural exodus leaves villages empty.
Slums lack basic services.
Gentrification raises property values.
Urban sprawl consumes farmland.
Tokyo is a megacity.
Green spaces improve quality of life.
The green belt prevents urban expansion.
Rural areas are quieter.
The neighborhood has many amenities.
